title: MoreTags
description: A mod that adds more tags to the game.
body:
## What is it?
A mod that adds more tags to the game.

## What types of tags does the mod add?
It only has block tags, but I hope to add tags for items.

## Why would you download it?
This mod is mainly for developers. It adds more tags that developers can use in their mod.

## What version is it for?
It is for Fabric 1.20.1 and will not be updated.

## What tags does it add?
### **Blocks**
- air
- all_amethyst
- amethyst_blocks
- amethyst_shards
- azalea
- big_dripleaf
- candles
- chorus_blocks
